73997676.title: Charlotte Owen, Baroness Owen of Alderley Edge

pageprops.defaultsort: Owen of Alderley Edge, Charlotte Owen, Baroness

73997676.extract: Charlotte Kathryn Tranter Owen, Baroness Owen of Alderley Edge (born 10 May 1993) is a British life peer and former special adviser. She has been a Conservative member of the House of Lords since 2023, and was the youngest recipient of a life peerage at the time of her appointment.
